summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on a reasoning-toggle feature branch (literate-coral), addressing bugs and code quality issues flagged by Greptile.
summary.outcome: All 4 PR review comments resolved: stale effort bug fixed, i18n wired up with translated French locale, and REASONING_SEP deduplicated across modules. Changes committed and pushed.

repo: Project uses a worktree layout at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/literate-coral/
Frontend JS lives in crates/web/src/assets/js/ — reasoning toggle, model store, and locale files are co-located there
i18n uses a t() helper; locale files are per-language under locales/{lang}/chat.js
REASONING_SEP was duplicated between models.js and model-store.js — canonical home is model-store.js, imported elsewhere
Dev mode loads layout.css, not a production bundle — CSS fixes must be applied there

code.finding: restoreReasoningFromModelId was only calling setReasoningEffort conditionally, leaving stale effort state when a session had no suffix. Fix: call setReasoningEffort unconditionally.
Dropdown labels (Off/Low/Medium/High) were hardcoded English strings instead of going through t() for i18n.
REASONING_SEP should be exported from here as the single source of truth.
REASONING_SEP was duplicated here; replaced with an import from model-store.js.
French locale strings for reasoning effort levels were not translated (still English).

workflow: Greptile is used as an automated PR reviewer and flags issues with priority levels (P1/P2)
Lint is run on changed files before committing as a standard pre-push step

friction: A prior amended force-push was needed to fix layout.css being missed — the dev/prod CSS split caused a fix to land in the wrong file initially
